31.reason: [The sorting starts from info + 1, which skips the first element (index 0). It should be qsort(info, n, sizeof(line), cmp) to sort the entire array.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The sorting starts from info + 1, which skips the first element (index 0). It should be qsort(info, n, sizeof(line), cmp) to sort the entire array.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The sorting starts from `info + 1`, skipping the first element (`info[0]`). This causes the array to be partially unsorted, leading to missed connections during chaining. It should be `qsort(info, n, sizeof(line), cmp);`]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [The qsort call starts sorting from info + 1, which skips the first element (index 0). It should be qsort(info, n, sizeof(line), cmp) to sort the entire array.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The qsort call starts sorting from info + 1 (i.e., skipping the first element), but it should sort the entire array starting from info. This causes the first element to be excluded from sorting, leading to incorrect ordering and potentially missing valid chains.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [The qsort call starts sorting from info + 1, which skips the first element (index 0). It should be qsort(info, n, sizeof(line), cmp) to sort the entire array.]
